summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival at Ferrari injects fresh momentum into the Scuderia's championship bid as they chase down the series leaders with renewed confidence after his commanding Spanish victory. McLaren's papaya army faces a critical test in the midfield battle, where strategic tire management and pit stop execution could determine which team capitalizes on Ferrari's resurgence. A strong result here would signal whether Hamilton's win in Barcelona marks a genuine turning point in Ferrari's campaign or merely a fleeting bright spot in their season-long struggle.
